top_signals.title: Oil prices fall even as U.S. and Iran give conflicting accounts of draft deal
top_signals.summary: Oil prices fell Friday after a proposed peace deal that would see the Strait of Hormuz reopen was reported by Iranian state media.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gold Declines as Traders Weigh Iran Deal Prospects, US Data
top_signals.summary: Gold edged lower as traders weighed prospects for a US-Iran peace deal and data that showed a pickup in US consumer sentiment alongside easing in inflation expectations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: PeaceGold, SigraFi sign responsible artisanal gold supply deal in DRC
top_signals.summary: PeaceGold was set up in 2013 with local nonprofit Conflict Resolution Center to help formalize artisanal mining and reintegrate former combatants into regulated work.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: New champion to be appointed for Britain’s mutuals and co-operatives
top_signals.summary: Plans for a new champion for mutuals and co-ops have been unveiled in a speech by the Economic Secretary to the Treasury in Birmingham today.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Warburg Pincus to launch $1.2bn tender offer for Japan dorm operator J.S.B.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Judge grants longer-term block of 'anti-weaponization' fund, wants guarantee it’s dead
Commissioner Roswall's closing speech at the Festival of the New European Bauhaus 2026
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 12 Jun 2026 Ladies and gentlemen,
Dear friends of the New European Bauhaus,
Festival visitors.
Good afternoon to you all,
